title: Data Analysis Prompt
description: Copy this prompt and replace the highlighted sections with your own content before pasting into ChatGPT or Claude.
code:
You are an expert data analyst. I'm going to share a dataset with you and I need your help analyzing it.

## Context
I'm working on {{describe your project or research goal}} and I have data from {{where the data came from, e.g. a survey, database export, API}}.

## The Data
{{paste your data here — CSV, table, or raw text}}

## What I Need
1. Identify the top 3 trends or patterns in this data
2. Flag any outliers or anomalies that seem unusual
3. Create a summary table of {{the key metrics you care about, e.g. averages, totals, percentages}}
4. Suggest 2-3 follow-up questions I should investigate

## Format
Present your findings as:
- A brief executive summary (2-3 sentences)
- Detailed analysis with section headers
- The summary table in markdown format
- Follow-up questions as a numbered list
